title.en: Purim: Joy, Charity, and the Hidden Hand of God
title.zh: 普珥节:欢乐、慈善与神的隐藏之手
title.he: פורים: שמחה, צדקה, ויד ה' הנסתרת

description: Understanding the four mitzvot of Purim: Megillah reading, mishloach manot, gifts to the poor, and the festive meal.
historical_period: Persian Empire (~475 BCE, during China's Warring States period 戰國時代)
chinese_dynasty_equivalent: Warring States period (戰國時代, 475-221 BCE)
chinese_cultural_parallels: Confucian values of 仁 (benevolence) and 义 (righteousness)

biblical_figures.name: Esther
biblical_figures.role: Jewish queen who saved her people

biblical_figures.name: Haman
biblical_figures.role: Villain who plotted to destroy the Jews
